title: [Debug] Make paths in HGLDD files relative
body:
Make paths emitted into HGLDD companion files relative to the file itself, or emit absolute paths. For example, the `foo/bar/hello.dd` companion file to `foo/bar/hello.sv` will now refer to the SV file as `hello.sv`, and to a `src/input.scala` file as `../../src/input.scala`. If paths cannot be made relative, for example because the output directory contains `../` components that cannot be handled, the paths are made absolute.

This fixes an issue where beforehand a tool consuming the HGLDD file would have to know the working directory in which `firtool` was run to create the HGLDD file. Now the files are self-contained, and paths are anchored at the HGLDD file itself.
